body:
This PR updates the calibration pipeline to use the latest ClimaCalibrate. Instead of using `addprocs` with the `WorkerBackend`, this PR uses the `DerechoBackend` and `GCPBackend`. This simplifies a calibration as it allows the user to start a calibration on a login node while the slurm or PBS jobs are submitted to run the simulation. 

TODO

- [x] Test if it works on Derecho
- [x] Update documentation if needed
title: Update calibration pipeline to use latest ClimaCalibrate
